message:
security(checkpoint,ensemble): harden checkpoint storage against path traversal, symlinks, and corrupt data

Comprehensive security hardening of the checkpoint subsystem to prevent
path traversal attacks, symlink-based data exfiltration, and fail-closed
handling of corrupt on-disk checkpoint data.

Ensemble checkpoint store (internal/ensemble/checkpoint.go):
- Add NormalizeCheckpointRunID() and normalizeCheckpointModeID() which
  trim, reject absolute paths, reject path separators, reject null bytes,
  and verify filepath.Clean() roundtrips. All public methods now validate
  IDs before using them as filesystem path segments.
- Add validateExistingCheckpointDirectory() which rejects symlinks and
  non-directories via os.Lstat, preventing symlink-based path traversal
- Add readRegularCheckpointFile() which rejects symlinks and non-regular
  files before reading, closing a TOCTOU gap in checkpoint loading
- Add post-load identity verification: LoadCheckpoint validates mode_id,
  LoadMetadata validates run_id, LoadSynthesisCheckpoint validates run_id,
  SaveCheckpoint validates output mode_id consistency
- Extract ensureRunDir() and safeRunDir() helpers that create/validate
  run directories with symlink checks
- LoadAllCheckpoints now fails closed on individual checkpoint load errors
  instead of silently skipping corrupt entries

Session checkpoint storage (internal/checkpoint):
- AutoCheckpointer.ListAutoCheckpoints now validates each candidate through
  storage.Load before including it, failing closed when the newest auto-
  checkpoint is invalid (matching GetLastAutoCheckpoint behavior)
- Add ListAutoCheckpoints tests for both auto and manual invalid checkpoint
  rejection
- Add GetByIndex test verifying CreatedAt-based ordering takes precedence
  over directory mtime
- Add GetLatest test for CreatedAt-over-mtime ordering and ErrNoCheckpoints
  sentinel error check
- Normalize test timestamps from time.Now() to fixed UTC times for
  deterministic ordering

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -747,7 +747,7 @@ func TestStorage_GetLatest_RejectsInvalidNewestCheckpointAfterTolerantList(t *te
 		ID:          "valid-checkpoint",
 		Name:        "valid",
 		SessionName: sessionName,
-		CreatedAt:   time.Now(),
+		CreatedAt:   time.Date(2025, 1, 1, 10, 0, 0, 0, time.UTC),
 		WorkingDir:  tmpDir,
 		Session:     SessionState{Panes: []PaneState{{Index: 0, ID: "%0"}}},
 	}
